segments.text: This Wario becomes scary real quick when you shut down his airdodge options
segments.original_text: 回避を切ると途端に怖くなるのがこのワリオというファイター
ここも回避の先を見ている

segments.text: Backing them into the corner with that spacing
segments.original_text: 逆打ち前がけに追い詰めて
いやーバイクまで使ってくるか

full_text: This Wario becomes scary real quick when you shut down his airdodge options Reading that airdodge again Backing them into the corner with that spacing Even using the bike?! Cornered!
